case_title: 미디어 프론티어 수료생 강사 양성 (강사 파이프라인)

all_files_exist.detail: All 5 required case files verified present: plan.md (181 lines), timeline.md (184 lines), budget.md (139 lines), logistics.md (216 lines), partner-brief.md (106 lines). Total: 826 lines. All files located in /products/ai-architect-academy/cases/C05/

timeline_has_dates.detail: Timeline exceeds minimum requirements with 12+ explicit date markers: Week -8 (2026-02-27~03-06), Week -6 (3/13~3/20), Week -4 (3/27~4/3), Week -2 (4/10~4/17), Week -1 (4/20~4/24), Week 0 (4/28~5/2), Week +1 (5/7~5/9), Week +2 (5/11), Week +3 (5/18), Week +6 (6/8), Week +12 (7/20), Week +26 (8/31). All dates are concrete calendar dates, not abstract D-N notation. Critical path clearly marked.

budget_sums_match.detail: Budget internal consistency verified: Original plan (₩7,200,000) = ₩6,300,000 (2 masters × ₩350K × 9 days) + ₩300,000 (Day 10 evaluation) + ₩160,000 (materials) + ₩150,000 (certificate) + ₩160,000 (snacks) + ₩130,000 (supplies) = ₩7,200,000 ✓. Adjusted plan (₩4,925,000) = ₩3,500,000 (Ryan 10d) + ₩350,000 (Jay Day 3) + ₩300,000 + ₩150,000 + ₩160,000 + ₩160,000 + ₩130,000 + ₩175,000 (reserve) = ₩4,925,000 ✓. All subtotals reconciled with ₩2,275,000 reserve for future cohorts.

no_placeholder_text.detail: Comprehensive scan across all 5 files for placeholder markers [TBD], [TODO], XXX, FIXME, [미정], 채워넣: ZERO instances found. All sections completed with specific values (names: Jay, Ryan, 강사, 코디네이터; dates: 2026-02-27 through 2026-08-31; amounts: ₩130K~₩3.5M; roles with detailed descriptions). No incomplete sections.

curriculum_alignment.detail: 4-part curriculum structure from SPEC.md fully preserved with explicit Train-the-Trainer adaptation: Part 1 (관점의 전환) expanded 40min→90min with pedagogical method training, Part 2 (협업과 조율) expanded 50min→90min with facilitation practice, Part 3 (지휘와 소통) expanded 90min→120min including TA practice session, Part 4 (성취와 비전) maintained 60min with MC/presentation facilitation. Plan.md Section 'Curriculum Adaptation' explicitly states: '기존 Future AI Leader's Academy 4-Part 구조를 수강자 관점에서 강사 관점으로 전환한다.'

spec_no_contradiction.detail: SPEC.md baseline (2026-02-23) fully consistent with C05. Program identity: Future AI Leader's Academy ✓. Faculty: Jay (이재원), Ryan (김지웅) as Filamentree master trainers ✓. Partner: 동아일보 ✓. Base curriculum 4-part structure preserved (not abandoned) ✓. Budget structure with trainer fees ₩350K/day, venue costs, snack budgets all within SPEC market ranges. No numerical contradictions detected. Case represents legitimate Phase 2 evolution, not deviation.

cross_case_no_duplicate.detail: Single-case testing mode: C05 is the only generated case in products/ai-architect-academy/cases/. Cross-case textual overlap comparison deferred until portfolio expands. Structural uniqueness documented: C05 is Train-the-Trainer (instructor supply pipeline), distinct from Phase 1 end-user delivery cases. Estimated future overlap <25% due to fundamentally different strategic purposes (supply chain vs. demand fulfillment).

partner_brief_standalone.detail: partner-brief.md (106 lines) contains all 5 required sections for standalone comprehension: (1) Program description (lines 10-19): Filamentree, Future AI Leader's Academy, parent-child co-founding, 4h workshop, working game examples. (2) Partner role (lines 54-62): 동아일보 contributions (venue, recruitment, budget, brand) with zero additional cost note. (3) Partner benefit (lines 39-52): immediate (KPI, content, branding) and medium-term (Phase 2 scaling). (4) Timeline (lines 80-89): 7 concrete milestones 3/7 to 8/31. (5) Next steps/CTA (lines 93-102): 3 action items with dates and contact. Document is self-contained; 동아일보 can execute without referencing other case files.

budget_realistic.detail: Unit cost analysis vs casegen.yaml market ranges: (1) Master trainer ₩350,000/day — market ₩200K-500K for Seoul specialist educators (WITHIN RANGE ✓). (2) Venue ₩0 (in-kind from 동아미디어센터) — realistic leverage of partner infrastructure (JUSTIFIED ✓). (3) Snacks/meals ₩20,000/day/person — above ₩5K-15K typical range but justified for full-day 10:00~17:00 programs with lunch + breaks under 2026 Seoul catering standards (DEFENSIBLE ✓). All unit economics realistic for target market.

strengths: Timeline critical path explicit: 예산승인(3/5) → 강의실예약(3/6) → 모집공고(3/17) → 합격자(4/3) → Day 9(4/15) → Day 10인증(5/11) → 첫단독(6/8)
Budget adjustments transparent with justification (Jay Product Lead unpaid, reserve allocation documented)
Risk matrix comprehensive: 7 identified risks with probability/impact assessment and specific mitigations
Partnership value clear: Three-way win (동아일보 KPI+execution, Filamentree Phase 2 supply, trainees credential+income)
Success metrics quantified: 6 KPIs (75%+ FCAI, 100% first solo, NPS 70+, 2+ regional, 60%+ portfolio reuse, 80% retention)
critical_findings.implementation_readiness: Case demonstrates operational maturity. Single critical prerequisite: 예산집행적격성 confirmation (3/5 deadline) on K-Digital activity budget eligibility. Upon approval, case has sufficient detail for full execution without additional research or design work.
